name: Case 2 — High Risk (upcoded claim)
description: Chart shows a simple same-day URI, but the bill claims pneumonia, extra medications, high complexity, and a very large amount.
chart_text: Patient seen for a common cold with mild cough and fever. Diagnosed with an upper respiratory infection (URI). Prescribed ibuprofen for symptom relief. No procedures performed. Patient discharged same day.
bill_text: Claim submitted for pneumonia, high complexity inpatient encounter. Medications billed: amoxicillin, albuterol, and steroid. Chest x-ray procedure billed. Total claim amount: $12,400.
